message:
feat(beads): add Phase 5I - Index Maintenance During Write Operations

Creates comprehensive bead structure for fixing index maintenance:

Epic: bd-36eh - Phase 5I: Index Maintenance During Write Operations

Tasks (in dependency order):
- bd-1mbd: 5I.1 - Diagnose index maintenance failure points
- bd-3jjd: 5I.2 - Ensure IndexSchema available to codegen for DML
- bd-qluy: 5I.6 - Implement IdxInsert and IdxDelete opcodes in VDBE
- bd-so1h: 5I.3 - Wire INSERT to create index entries
- bd-34se: 5I.4 - Wire DELETE to remove index entries
- bd-2f9t: 5I.5 - Wire UPDATE to maintain index entries
- bd-1nmg: 5I.7 - Comprehensive index maintenance test suite
- bd-142z: 5I.8 - Remove REINDEX workarounds from codebase

This addresses the reported issue where FrankenSQLite doesn't properly
maintain indexes during writes, requiring REINDEX workarounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
